basic_details.job_title: Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Guest Faculties Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by the NCTE New Delhi. Basic Computer Knowledge.
qualification.details: Master Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by the NCTE New Delhi Basic Computer Knowledge Teaching experience and basic experience in computer application.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.400/- per class/lecturer of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 50 classes with Rs. 20,000/- rupees per month.
salary_details.details: Rs.400/- per class/lecturer of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 50 classes with Rs. 20,000/- rupees per month.

selection_process: Carrier assessment Teaching experience Basic experience in computer application
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculties posts at Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Guest Faculties posts is 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculties position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, along with a B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi. Basic computer knowledge is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to the Guest Faculties posts is below 65 years of age. There is no mention of minimum age criteria in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Guest Faculties posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculties posts includes carrier assessment, teaching experience, and basic experience in computer application. These factors will be evaluated to determine the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculties at Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 400/- per class/lecturer of 45 minutes duration. This is subject to a ceiling of a maximum of 50 classes, resulting in a maximum monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Guest Faculties recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided information, there is no application fee mentioned for the Guest Faculties recruitment at Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee payment.

faq.question: Q7. How should candidates submit their applications?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the official notification. No submissions will be accepted via mail or postal services.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for Guest Faculties?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Guest Faculty at Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela. This recruitment drive aims to fill this single position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Guest Faculties position at Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela is temporary. This means the engagement is for a specific period and not a permanent appointment.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela located?
faq.answer: Dr. Katju Govt HSS Bhela is located in Bhela, Odisha, with the pincode 766106. Candidates applying for the position should be aware of the location.
